discrepancy: PDF heading is '4 Associated Persons Data' (plain text, heading level 1); MD heading is '# SDTM v2.0 — Chapter 4: Associated Persons Data' (adds document title prefix and chapter label). Semantic content matches but verbatim differs.
PDF ends with colon after 'including:'; MD ends with colon after 'rules:' — trailing word changed from 'including' to 'rules' but intro sentence is otherwise semantically equivalent.

PDF a005: 'Implementers creating AP domains will follow the AP assumptions for the Identifier variables.' MD a009 covers APID identifier role but reframes as explanatory note about APID removal from Section 3.1.4 — does not reproduce the normative 'will follow the AP assumptions for Identifier variables' rule. Only ~40% content overlap. [KEYWORD_MISSING: will]

PDF: 'AP will be the prefix for the domain and dataset name, and will identify the dataset as AP data.' MD a008: 'AP domains use the domain code prefix AP followed by the relevant domain code. For example, associated persons demographics would use APDM.' — MD rephrases and adds example (APDM) but omits 'will identify the dataset as AP data' normative language; adds prefix elaboration not in PDF atom. Semantic intent partially matches.

PDF a007: 'The Associated Persons Identifier (APID) will be required in all AP datasets, and will identify records as AP data.' MD a009 mentions APID as identifier but does not reproduce 'will be required in all AP datasets' or 'will identify records as AP data' — the mandatory/required nature is absent. [KEYWORD_MISSING: required]

PDF a008: 'The SDTM Implementation Guide, Associated Persons (SDTMIG-AP; available at https://www.cdisc.org/standards/foundational/sdtmig-ap) provides implementation rules, advice, and examples.' MD a014: 'Additional guidance for implementing AP domains is provided in the SDTM Implementation Guide: Associated Persons (SDTMIG-AP).' — MD omits the URL, omits 'rules, advice, and examples' specifics, and changes 'implementation rules, advice, and examples' to generic 'Additional guidance'. ~60% coverage.

PDF a009: 'Unless an exception is described in the SDTMIG-AP, all other general assumptions about SDTM and SDTMIGc variables and domains apply to AP data.' No MD atom reproduces this normative statement. md_model_04_a014 references SDTMIG-AP only for guidance, not this fallback rule. [KEYWORD_MISSING: shall]

PDF a010: 'The variables in the following table are used in AP domains.' MD a017: 'The table of variables used in Associated Persons Data includes all variables from the general observation classes, with the addition of AP-specific identifiers:' — MD adds 'includes all variables from the general observation classes, with the addition of AP-specific identifiers' which is not present in PDF atom; introduces content not sourced from this atom.

MD dropped 7 columns: Format, Variable(s) Qualified, Usage Restrictions, Variable C-code, Definition (merged into Notes), Examples, # (row number). PDF has 12 columns: #|Variable Name|Variable Label|Type|Format|Role|Variable(s) Qualified|Usage Restrictions|Variable C-code|Definition|Notes|Examples. MD has 5 columns: Variable|Label|Type|Role|Notes.

MD a020 retains Variable Name (APID), Label, Type (Char), Role (Identifier), and core Definition text including POOLDEF/Section 6.3/Section 4 cross-refs. Missing from MD: row number (#=1), Format column (empty in PDF but column absent in MD), Variable(s) Qualified (empty), Usage Restrictions (empty), Variable C-code (C55361 — absent in MD), Examples (empty in PDF but column absent). Net missing fields: # row, Format, Variable(s) Qualified, Usage Restrictions, Variable C-code.

MD a021 retains Variable Name (RSUBJID), Label, Type (Char), Role (Identifier), and partial definition. Missing from MD: row number (#=2), Format, Variable(s) Qualified, Usage Restrictions, Variable C-code, Examples columns. Additionally MD truncates definition — omits 'RSUBJID will be null for data about associated persons who are related to the study but not to any study subjects.' sentence present in PDF a013.

MD a022 retains Variable Name (RDEVID), Label, Type (Char), Role (Identifier), and definition 'Identifier for a related device. RDEVID will be populated with the SPDEVID of the related device.' — definition text matches PDF. Missing from MD: row number (#=3), Format, Variable(s) Qualified, Usage Restrictions, Variable C-code, Examples columns.

MD a023 retains Variable Name (SREL), Type (Char), Role (Identifier), and condensed definition covering RSUBJID/RDEVID/null cases. Missing from MD: row number (#=4), Label mismatch (PDF: 'Standardized Relationship to Subject or Study Relationship'; MD: 'Subject, Device, or Study Relationship' — label changed), Format, Variable(s) Qualified, Usage Restrictions, Variable C-code, Examples columns. PDF definition references 'APID' explicitly ('the relationship of the person(s) identified in APID to the subject or pool identified in RSUBJID') whereas MD omits APID reference in RSUBJID branch and STUDYID branch.
